{"id":"project-LICHEN-inym.5","title":"Zephyr/C impl: Density-aware startup delay","description":"Implement density-aware startup delay in Zephyr/C firmware.

## Files to modify
- lichen/subsys/lichen/ (locate startup and announce code)
- Possibly add lichen/subsys/lichen/startup/ module

## Changes
1. Add startup state machine: LISTEN -> DELAY -> ACTIVE
2. Track unique IIDs heard during listen phase (use fixed-size set, ~64 entries)
3. Calculate delay: min(300, nodes_heard * 5) seconds
4. Apply to first announce, DIO, and DIS transmission

## Memory constraints
- Fixed-size heard set (no malloc)
- Use Bloom filter if memory-constrained nodes need >64 tracking

## Constants (Kconfig)
- CONFIG_LICHEN_STARTUP_LISTEN_MIN=30
- CONFIG_LICHEN_STARTUP_LISTEN_MAX=60
- CONFIG_LICHEN_STARTUP_DELAY_PER_NODE=5
- CONFIG_LICHEN_STARTUP_DELAY_MAX=300

## Testing
- Renode multi-node test showing staggered startup
- Verify constrained nodes (64KB RAM) handle the tracking","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:28.006962Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:28.006962Z","labels":["zephyr","c","firmware","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-inym","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:28.146026Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:28.262307Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Zephyr/C startup state machine added with LISTEN->DELAY->ACTIVE, fixed-size heard set for unique IIDs from RX, Kconfig constants, staggered startup in Renode tests
